kpis.label: CA Aujourd'hui
kpis.query: SELECT ISNULL(SUM(ABS(pv.PCVMNTHT) * pn.PINSENSSTATISTIQUE), 0) AS valeur FROM PIECEVENTES pv JOIN PIECE_NATURE pn ON pn.PINID = pv.PINID WHERE pn.PITCODE = 'F' AND pn.PINSENSSTATISTIQUE <> 0 AND CONVERT(DATE, pv.PCVDATEEFFET) = CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE())

kpis.label: CA Mois en cours
kpis.query: SELECT ISNULL(SUM(ABS(pv.PCVMNTHT) * pn.PINSENSSTATISTIQUE), 0) AS valeur FROM PIECEVENTES pv JOIN PIECE_NATURE pn ON pn.PINID = pv.PINID WHERE pn.PITCODE = 'F' AND pn.PINSENSSTATISTIQUE <> 0 AND YEAR(pv.PCVDATEEFFET) = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND MONTH(pv.PCVDATEEFFET) = MONTH(GETDATE())

kpis.label: Factures du jour
kpis.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS valeur FROM PIECEVENTES pv JOIN PIECE_NATURE pn ON pn.PINID = pv.PINID WHERE pn.PITCODE = 'F' AND pn.PINSENSSTATISTIQUE = 1 AND CONVERT(DATE, pv.PCVDATEEFFET) = CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE())

kpis.label: Clients actifs (30j)
kpis.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pv.TIRID) AS valeur FROM PIECEVENTES pv JOIN PIECE_NATURE pn ON pn.PINID = pv.PINID WHERE pn.PITCODE = 'F' AND pn.PINSENSSTATISTIQUE = 1 AND pv.PCVDATEEFFET >= DATEADD(DAY, -30, GETDATE())

kpis.label: CA 12 derniers mois
kpis.query: SELECT FORMAT(pv.PCVDATEEFFET, 'yyyy-MM') AS label, ISNULL(SUM(ABS(pv.PCVMNTHT) * pn.PINSENSSTATISTIQUE), 0) AS valeur FROM PIECEVENTES pv JOIN PIECE_NATURE pn ON pn.PINID = pv.PINID WHERE pn.PITCODE = 'F' AND pn.PINSENSSTATISTIQUE <> 0 AND pv.PCVDATEEFFET >= DATEADD(MONTH, -11, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1)) GROUP BY FORMAT(pv.PCVDATEEFFET, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY label

kpis.label: Top 10 clients (mois)
kpis.query: SELECT TOP 10 t.TIRSOCIETE AS label, ISNULL(SUM(ABS(pv.PCVMNTHT) * pn.PINSENSSTATISTIQUE), 0) AS valeur FROM PIECEVENTES pv JOIN PIECE_NATURE pn ON pn.PINID = pv.PINID JOIN TIERS t ON t.TIRID = pv.TIRID WHERE pn.PITCODE = 'F' AND pn.PINSENSSTATISTIQUE = 1 AND YEAR(pv.PCVDATEEFFET) = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND MONTH(pv.PCVDATEEFFET) = MONTH(GETDATE()) GROUP BY t.TIRID, t.TIRSOCIETE ORDER BY valeur DESC

kpis.label: Commandes mobile (non traitées)
kpis.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS valeur FROM EXT_APP_COMMANDES WHERE TRAITE = 'N'
